Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor

Class ElementText

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.TimerText
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.ElementText
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, org.eclipse.swt.events.ModifyListener, org.eclipse.swt.internal.SWTEventListener
public abstract class ElementText extends TimerText

  • Constructor Details

    • ElementText

      public ElementText(IEventBInputText text, org.eclipse.swt.custom.TreeEditor editor, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Tree tree, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.TreeItem item, IRodinElement element, int column, int delay)
      Constructor.

      Parameters:
      text - The actual Text Widget.
      editor - The Tree Editor.
      item - The Tree Item associated with this Text Widget.
      element - The Rodin Element corresponds to this Text Widget
      column - The column in the Editable Tree Viewer of the Text Widget.

  • Method Details

    • commit

      public abstract void commit(IRodinElement elm, int col, String contents)
      Committing the content of the text according to the current column and the given content.

      Parameters:
      elm - The Rodin Element corresponding to this Text
      col - The column in the Editable Tree Viewer.
      contents - The content that will be committed.

    • nextEditableCell

      public abstract void nextEditableCell()
      Select the next editable cell in the Editable Tree Viewer. If there are no next editable cell then do nothing.

    • prevEditableCell

      public abstract void prevEditableCell()
      Select the previous editable cell in the Editable Tree Viewer. If there are no previous editable cell then do nothing.
